title: lithocarpus thalassicus
intro: Lithocarpus thalassicus, also known as the coastal live oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus thalassicus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
